sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ أَحْمَدُ بِصُدَاعٍ خَفِيفٍ فِي رَأْسِهِ يَوْمَ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je jučer osjetio blagu glavobolju.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed felt a slight headache yesterday.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِيَشْتَرِيَ بَعْضَ الدَّوَاءِ الْمُسَكِّنِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u apoteku da kupi neki lijek protiv bolova.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the pharmacy to buy some painkiller medicine.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ لَهُ كَيْفِيَّةَ تَنَاوُلِ الدَّوَاءِ بَعْدَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mu je objasnio kako da uzima lijek nakon jela.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explained to him how to take the medicine after eating.
